title: Vanilla Expansion Overhaul | veo
description: Experience a reimagined vanilla Minecraft with new challenges and balanced gameplay. Everything is enhanced for a more engaging and unique adventure, perfect for any player. Dive in without limits or set paths.
body:
# Vanilla Expansion Overhaul (VEO)

Is a modpack designed to enhance the classic Minecraft experience by adding vanilla-style content with a twist. This modpack drastically changes the way you obtain mythical items, making the game more challenging yet balanced. It offers a "vanilla +" experience, focusing on maintaining good performance while providing a fresh, fun, and engaging adventure. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to Minecraft, Vanilla Expansion Overhaul offers a unique journey for everyone, without imposing tasks or predefined paths. Dive into a world where every adventure is your own, and discover a reimagined take on the classic vanilla experience!

> Photon Shaders were used in the photos below
